SEQUENCE.COMMENT: publishFwEnvelope - the only service that publishes the framework envelope fwEnvelope

MAP.COMMENT: blank any input parameters if null

EXIT.NAME: routeCluster=='' || operation=='' || traceTransID==''
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: Cannot publish document without proper input
EXIT.COMMENT: Cannot publish document without proper input

MAP.NAME: operation=='TRIAL'
MAP.COMMENT: clusterName ==> extField1

BRANCH.COMMENT: if the routeCluster is actually the name of a routing group, then we need to select a member of that routing group to be the actual routeCluster

SEQUENCE.NAME: gval != ''
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: we do this by simply taking the modulus of the transaction id using the number of clusters in the cluster group

INVOKE.COMMENT: (nanoseconds, 13, 15) ==> dividend - easy way to get a fairly random number

MAP.COMMENT: routeTo = items[ %remainder% ]

INVOKE.COMMENT: The request to route to fwMapGroup%routeCluster% has resulted in routing the fwEnvelope to %routeTo%

Values.value: The request to route to fwMapGroup%routeCluster% has resulted in routing the fwEnvelope to %routeTo%

MAP.COMMENT: drop
routeTo = routeCluster
drop
all fields into the fwEnvelope

EXIT.NAME: posBrklist == -1 && posUMlist == -1
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is not configured in either the fwBrokerClusterList nor the fwUMClusterList
EXIT.COMMENT: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is not configured in either the fwBrokerClusterList nor the fwUMClusterList

EXIT.NAME: posBrklist != -1 && posUMlist != -1
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is configured in both the fwBrokerClusterList and the fwUMClusterList
EXIT.COMMENT: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is configured in both the fwBrokerClusterList and the fwUMClusterList

EXIT.NAME: posDistlist == -1 && posCentrallist == -1
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is not configured in either the fwDistClusterList nor the fwCentralClusterList
EXIT.COMMENT: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is not configured in either the fwDistClusterList nor the fwCentralClusterList

EXIT.NAME: posDistlist != -1 && posCentrallist != -1
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is configured in both the fwDistClusterList and the fwCentralClusterList
EXIT.COMMENT: FE0000 The route to cluster '%routeTo%' is configured in both the fwDistClusterList and the fwCentralClusterList

MAP.COMMENT: xType = na

BRANCH.COMMENT: set xType based on one of sixteen possible scenarios

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='N' && isBrokerConfigured=='true' && posCentrallist != -1 && posUMlist != -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = xover scenario 2 - from central BRK to central UM

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='N' && isBrokerConfigured=='true' && posCentrallist == -1 && posUMlist != -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = xover scenario 4 - from central BRK to dist UM

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='N' && isBrokerConfigured=='false' && posCentrallist != -1 && posUMlist == -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = xover scenario 5 - from central UM to central BRK

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='N' && isBrokerConfigured=='false' && posCentrallist == -1 && posUMlist == -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = xover scenario 7 - from central UM to dist BRK

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='Y' && isBrokerConfigured=='true' && posCentrallist != -1 && posUMlist != -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = pubover scenario 10 - from dist BRK to central UM

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='Y' && isBrokerConfigured=='true' && posCentrallist == -1 && posUMlist != -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = na scenario 12 - not supported

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='Y' && isBrokerConfigured=='false' && posCentrallist != -1 && posUMlist == -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = pubover scenario 13 - from dist UM to central BRK

MAP.NAME: isDistributed=='Y' && isBrokerConfigured=='false' && posCentrallist == -1 && posUMlist == -1
MAP.COMMENT: xType = na scenario 15 - not supported

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: xType = pub otherwise, just publish the document

SEQUENCE.NAME: xover
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: cross the document over to the opposite broker/UM

MAP.COMMENT: extract the code and message from the output HTML
drop

SEQUENCE.NAME: pubover
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: publish a crossover request to the local broker/UM

MAP.COMMENT: save the routeTo as a prefix to the first extended field, and the operation as a prefix to the second extended field
then change the routeCluster to fwXoverInstance and the operation to XOVER
extract a small loggable portion of extField3 and extField4
drop
